Platform overview

Five operators.
One coherent system.

CEOClaw doesn't give you another AI chat box. It gives you a coordinated execution layer — five operators that share context, compound actions, and route resources toward what matters most.

Start Free → View Product

How it flows

The execution loop, end to end.

Every cycle starts with your goal and ends with a measurable output. The planner routes, the operators execute, the evaluator scores, and the loop continues.

🎯
Goal
$100 MRR
→
🧠
Planner
Prioritize
→
⚡
Router
Domain select
→
🔬
Operators
Execute
→
📊
Evaluator
Score output
→
🔁
Loop
Or complete

Core capabilities

What each operator does.

🔬

Research Operator

Validates your idea before you build. Maps the competitor landscape, identifies demand signals, and surfaces the ICP most likely to convert — all grounded in real market context.

Idea validation Competitor mapping ICP definition
✦

Brand Operator

Generates naming options, positioning statements, messaging hierarchy, and design token seeds — all coherent with your target market and differentiation strategy.

Naming Positioning Design tokens
⬡

Website Operator

Builds conversion-optimized, multi-page sites from a single intent prompt. Output is production-ready HTML with semantic structure, accessibility basics, and responsive layout — not just a mockup.

Multi-page Responsive Accessible
◈

Outreach Operator

Writes cold outreach sequences, warm intro drafts, and follow-up cadences targeted to the ICP defined in research. Tone-matched to your brand and personalized for each segment.

Cold sequences ICP-targeted Brand-matched
◉

Analytics Operator

Tracks MRR progress against your target, identifies stagnation patterns before they compound, and generates next-best-action recommendations at each evaluation cycle.

MRR tracking Stagnation detection Action routing
// cycle evaluation output
Current MRR $50.00
Target MRR $100.00
Trend direction up ↑
Recommended domain outreach

Who it serves

The right tool for lean, fast operators.

🚀

Solo Founders

Run all five functions — research, brand, website, outreach, analytics — without a team. CEOClaw is the bandwidth you didn't know you could have.

⚡

Indie Hackers

Validate faster, ship earlier, iterate tighter. Spend your energy on the thing only you can do — let CEOClaw handle the structured execution work.

◆

Lean Startup Teams

Stretch every person further. Give each teammate the operational leverage of a full function without the overhead of managing five separate tools or contractors.

Differentiators

Why CEOClaw outperforms point tools.

01

Shared operator memory

Every operator reads and writes to a shared session state. Brand context informs outreach. Research findings shape website copy. Actions compound.

02

Goal-driven routing

The router doesn't follow a fixed script — it evaluates your MRR gap and routes the next cycle to the highest-leverage domain.

03

Evaluation baked in

After every cycle, an evaluator scores the output against your goal. No manual check-ins. No status updates. The system knows where it stands.

04

Stagnation override

If progress stalls, the planner rotates domains automatically — preventing you from getting stuck in a single operational mode that's no longer moving the needle.

Ready to run the full system?

Start free. Your execution layer spins up in seconds.
